title: ♄ SATURN (Design) — Gate 61.2
content:
♄ SATURN (Design) — Gate 61.2
Theme: Mystery / Inspiration   Trait: You face pressure to answer the unknowable.   Line 2: Genius emerges in solitude. Needs peace to access insight.
♅ URANUS (Personality) — Gate 51.6
Theme: Shock → Awakening   Trait: You challenge comfort zones. Catalyst energy.   Line 6: Role model of bravery. Others observe your fearless leap.
♅ URANUS (Design) — Gate 38.6
Theme: Struggle for Meaning   Trait: Your struggle must have a higher purpose.   Line 6: Lives to show others how to fight for what matters.
♆ NEPTUNE (Personality) — Gate 60.4
Theme: Limits → Mutation   Trait: True freedom is inside structure.   Line 4: You teach this through networks and chosen communities.
♆ NEPTUNE (Design) — Gate 19.4
Theme: Sensitivity to Needs   Trait: You are empathically aware of others’ needs.   Line 4: Sensitive through community — picks up “tribal field.”
♇ PLUTO (Personality) — Gate 61.4
Theme: Inner Truth / Mystery   Trait: Your transformation comes from holding the unknowable.   Line 4: You serve the mystery by sharing within your trusted group.
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 43 (chunk 43/57)
